intro_feature_deuces_text: Deuces act as jokers and can substitute for any card!
intro_feature_card_swap_text: The top cards of the piles can swap places with the hand cards if they form a pair.
intro_feature_random_super_text: Triggers randomly and doubles the round’s winnings.
gamble_win_exceeds_max:
{dcdcdc}You won {ffcb00}{0}{dcdcdc}!
Win is too big to gamble.
basegame_win_exceeds_max:
{dcdcdc}Congratulations! You won {ffcb00}{0}{dcdcdc}.
Win is too big to gamble.
help_description: Pick'n Go Poker™ Deuces Wild is a video poker game in which your aim is to obtain the best possible poker hand.
help_how_to_play_description_0: • Press BET button to select the desired bet for the round.
help_how_to_play_description_1: • Press PLAY button to start the round.
help_how_to_play_description_2: • The game will deal two cards to your hand and two piles of three cards each. Form your poker hand by choosing one of the two card piles.
help_wins_description_0: The winning card combinations and amounts are shown in the paytable.
help_wins_description_1: You can transfer winnings to your balance by pressing COLLECT or attempt to increase your winnings through the Gamble Feature by pressing GAMBLE.
help_wins_description_2: The maximum win multiplier per game round (base game or any Super Round) is {maxWinFactor} times the total bet. If the win for a game round reaches this limit, the player is awarded a win according to the maximum win multiplier.
help_wins_description_3: If a hand qualifies for more than one winning category, only the highest-ranking winning category is paid out.
help_deck_description_0: The game uses a deck of 52 cards.
help_deck_description_2:
- Ace (A) 1 or 14, whichever is more advantageous to your hand. On the doubling round, aces (A) are always valued at one.
- King (K):13.
- Queen (Q): 12.
- Jack (J): 11.
- 3– 10: According to the number.
- 2: Joker. In Gamble Feature, deuces always have a value of 2.
help_hands_description_five_of_a_kind: Five cards of the same rank. This requires a deuce.
help_hands_description_straight_flush: Five cards of the same suit in consecutive order.
help_hands_description_four_of_a_kind: Four cards of the same rank.
help_hands_description_full_house: Three of a kind and a pair in the same hand.
help_hands_description_flush: Five cards of the same suit, in any order.
help_hands_description_straight: Five cards of any suit, in consecutive order.
help_hands_description_three_of_a_kind: Three cards of the same rank.
help_hands_description_two_pair: Two different pairs in the same hand.
help_cardswap_description_0: If the topmost cards of the card piles form a pair, they are exchanged with the cards in your hand. If you wish, you can cancel the exchange by pressing CHANGE button.
help_cardswap_description_1: No exchange is made if both the topmost cards of the piles and the cards in your hand form pairs. Continue the game by choosing one of the two card piles.
help_cardswap_description_2: If the topmost cards of the card piles and the cards in your hand form a four of a kind, the topmost cards of the piles are moved to your hand. Continue the game by choosing one of the remaining four cards.
help_superround_description: Each round has an 8% random chance of being a Super Round. A Super Round lasts for one round, during which all winnings from the main game are doubled. The winning card combinations and sums are shown in the paytable.
help_gamble_description_0: In the Gamble Feature, you must guess whether the value of the face down card is:
help_gamble_description_4: The small cards include the ace (A) and the numbers between 2 and 6. The large cards include the numbers 8 to 10 as well as J, Q and K. The black sevens are the seven of spades and the seven of clubs.
help_gamble_description_6: • If you guess correctly, you win. You can continue by pressing SMALL, LARGE or BLACK 7 or quit by pressing COLLECT.
help_gamble_description_7: • If you guess incorrectly, you lose the gambled amount, and the Gamble Feature ends.
help_gamble_description_8_bet_return: • Regardless of your choice, if you get a red seven (of hearts or diamonds), your bet will be returned to you. You can continue by pressing SMALL, LARGE or BLACK 7 or end by pressing COLLECT.
help_gamble_description_8_bet_win: • Regardless of your choice, if you get a red seven (of hearts or diamonds), you win double your bet. You can continue by pressing SMALL, LARGE or BLACK 7 or end by pressing COLLECT.
help_gamble_description_9: The maximum win from the Gamble Feature is limited to the game's maximum win multiplier.
help_player_decisions_description_0: Player decisions influence the theoretical return to player (RTP).
help_player_decisions_description_1: The stated RTP is based on the strategy used by the game system over time. Player choices may affect the actual return. The outcome of each game round is determined by randomly dealt cards.
help_strategy_table_0_description: 1. Card exchange– top to bottom: swap cards if the condition is met
help_strategy_table_0_column_0_row_0: Top cards of piles form a pair
help_strategy_table_0_column_0_row_1: Pile contains a pair of deuces
help_strategy_table_0_column_1_row_1: Swap → choose the card closest to 8
help_strategy_table_0_column_1_row_2: Swap → try to form three of a kind
help_strategy_table_0_column_1_row_3: Swap → try to form three of a kind or straight
help_strategy_table_0_column_0_row_4: The deuce helps form a straight flush, straight, or flush
help_strategy_table_0_column_1_row_4: Prioritise a straight flush. If that’s not possible, go for a straight. If a straight isn’t possible either, go for a flush.
help_strategy_table_1_description: 2. No swap – act based on the first matching situation
help_strategy_table_1_column_1_row_0: Try to make three of a kind
help_strategy_table_1_column_1_row_2: Both are straight flushes and gap < 2 → choose tighter one</br>Only one is straight flush and gap < 2 → choose it
help_strategy_table_1_column_1_row_3: If straight flush with gap < 2 → choose it, otherwise flush
help_strategy_table_2_description: 3. Gap – How to calculate the gap when comparing possible straight starts
help_strategy_table_2_column_1_row_0: Ace can be 1 or 14. Deuces are not included in the gap calculation.
